Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education promoting appreciation of cultural diversity and humanistic care, directly aligning with Target 4.7.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course centers on the history and identity of minority ethnic groups ('少數民族'), directly addressing social inclusion and inequality based on ethnicity as per Target 10.2.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Examines state-minority relations, national narratives ('國族主義'), and policies ('鑄牢中華民族共同體意識'), linking to inclusive institutions and non-discriminatory policies (Targets 16.7, 16.b).
